pages.latin_text: Trēs fēlīculī erant: Digitālia, Thomas, et Moppet.
pages.english_text: There were three little kittens: Mittens, Tom Kitten, and Moppet.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_004.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha indoors with her three kittens.

pages.latin_text: Ōlim māter convīvium parāre volēbat.
pages.english_text: One day their mother wanted to have a tea party.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_005.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha scrubbing Moppet's face.

pages.latin_text: Fēlīculōs lāvit et pīlōs eōrum dēpēxit.
pages.english_text: She washed the kittens and brushed their fur.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_006.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha brushing a kitten's fur.

pages.latin_text: Caudās et vibrissās eōrum pēxit.
pages.english_text: She combed their tails and whiskers.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_007.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha combing Tom Kitten.

pages.latin_text: Thomam tunicā caeruleā vestīvit. Sed Thomas nimis pinguis erat!
pages.english_text: She dressed Tom in a blue suit. But Tom was very fat!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_009.jpg] Tom in his tight blue suit, buttons popping.

pages.latin_text: Fībulae dēsiluērunt! Māter eās resūit.
pages.english_text: Several buttons popped off. Mother sewed them back on.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_008.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha getting clothes from chest to dress Tom.

pages.latin_text: "Īte in hortum! Vestīmenta munda servāte!" inquit Māter.
pages.english_text: "Go into the garden. Keep your clothes clean!" said Mother.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_010.jpg] Mrs. Tabitha sending the dressed-up kittens outside.

pages.latin_text: Moppet et Digitālia per hortum ambulābant. In stōlīs suīs offendērunt!
pages.english_text: Moppet and Mittens walked down the path. They tripped on their dresses!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_011.jpg] Moppet and Mittens walking unsteadily.

pages.latin_text: In hortō cecidērunt et sordidī factī sunt.
pages.english_text: They fell in the garden and got dirty.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_012.jpg] Kittens tumbling and playing, clothes turned around.

pages.latin_text: Thomas mūrum ascendit. Petasus dēcidit! Fībulae iterum dēsiluērunt!
pages.english_text: Tom climbed up the wall. His hat fell off! His buttons burst!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_013.jpg] Tom Kitten climbing wall, hat falling, buttons bursting.

pages.latin_text: Moppet et Digitālia Thomam adiuvāre temptāvērunt. Sed vestīmenta omnia cecidērunt!
pages.english_text: Moppet and Mittens tried to help Tom. But all his clothes fell off!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_014.jpg] Sisters pulling at Tom's clothes on the wall.

pages.latin_text: Tum trēs anatēs in viā vēnērunt. Pit pat! Pit pat!
pages.english_text: Then three ducks came down the road. Pit pat paddle pat!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_015.jpg] Kittens on wall, ducks approaching below.

pages.latin_text: Anatēs petasum et vestīmenta Thomae sustulērunt!
pages.english_text: The ducks picked up Tom's hat and clothes!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_017.jpg] Ducks picking up clothes, kittens watching from wall.

pages.latin_text: Fēlīculī rīsērunt! Digitālia dē mūrō cecidit!
pages.english_text: The kittens laughed! Mittens fell off the wall!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_018.jpg] Kittens on wall laughing, Mittens nearly falling.

pages.latin_text: Anas tunicam caeruleam Thomae induit. Nōn conveniēbat!
pages.english_text: Mr. Drake put on Tom's blue suit. It did not fit!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_020.jpg] Mr. Drake in Tom's ill-fitting blue suit.

pages.latin_text: Anatēs in vestīmentīs fēlīculōrum abiērunt.
pages.english_text: The ducks walked away in the kittens' clothes.
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_021.jpg] Ducks waddling up road in kittens' clothes.

pages.latin_text: Tum Māter in hortum vēnit. Fēlīculī nūdī erant!
pages.english_text: Then Mother came into the garden. The kittens had no clothes on!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_022.jpg] Tabitha finding naked kittens on wall.

pages.latin_text: Māter īrātissima erat! Fēlīculōs pūnīvit!
pages.english_text: Mother was very angry. She smacked the kittens!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_023.jpg] Tabitha pulling kittens off wall and smacking them.

pages.latin_text: Eōs in lectum mīsit. Sed fēlīculī in lectō nōn mānsērunt!
pages.english_text: She sent them to bed. But the kittens did not stay in bed!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_025.jpg] Kittens NOT in bed — climbing curtains, making a mess.

pages.latin_text: Et vestīmenta anatum in stāgnum cecidērunt!
pages.english_text: And the ducks' clothes fell off in the pond!
pages.image_prompt: [IMAGE: image_027.jpg] Ducks swimming, clothes falling off in pond.
